assignments.description: Builds a new ContactPointAddress from blank-state business screen AddedItems.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_New_Address_AddAll_Bus
assignments.label: Build New Address Record (Add All Business)

assignments.description: Builds a new ContactPointEmail from blank-state person screen AddedItems.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_New_Email_AddAll
assignments.label: Build New Email Record (Add All)

assignments.description: Builds a new ContactPointPhone from blank-state person screen AddedItems.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_New_Phone_AddAll
assignments.label: Build New Phone Record (Add All)

assignments.description: Builds a new ContactPointPhone from blank-state business screen AddedItems.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_New_Phone_AddAll_Bus
assignments.label: Build New Phone Record (Add All Business)

assignments.description: Captures the Add / Manage choice and the Person Account type picker from Screen_Select_And_Manage. Business Account type is captured by Assign_Set_Type_Business_Picker via Decision_Capture_Type_By_Account.
assignments.name: Assign_Set_Add_Or_Manage
assignments.label: Set Add or Manage and Type Selections

assignments.description: Sets var_AddAllContext to "add" so Screen_Add_All_Person and Screen_Add_All_Business display the "add new" header copy instead of the blank-state copy.
assignments.name: Assign_Set_Context_Add
assignments.label: Set Add Context

assignments.description: Captures var_SelectedType from the Business Account type picker (Address/Phone only). Reached from Decision_Capture_Type_By_Account when account is not a Person Account.
assignments.name: Assign_Set_Type_Business_Picker
assignments.label: Set Type from Business Picker

assignments.description: Builds a new ContactPointAddress from blank-state person screen AddedItems. Stamps ParentId and field values onto var_SingleAddress, adds to var_NewAddresses.
assignments.name: Assign_Store_Primary_Selections
assignments.label: Store Primary Selections from Screen

choices.description: Visual picker choice for adding new contact information. Routes to the add-all screen for addresses, emails, and phones.
choices.name: choice_AddNew

choices.description: Radio button choice for managing Mailing Addresses. Shown on both Person and Business Account type picker screens.
choices.name: choice_Address

choices.description: Radio button choice for managing Email Addresses. Only shown on the Person Account type picker screen.
choices.name: choice_Email

choices.description: Visual picker choice for managing existing contact information. Routes to the type picker (address, phone, email).
choices.name: choice_ManageExisting
choices.choiceText: Add or Update Existing Contact Info

choices.description: Radio button choice for managing Phone Numbers. Shown on both Person Account and Business Account type picker screens.
choices.name: choice_Phone

decisions.description: Routes the Add New path to the correct add-all screen based on account type. Person Account → Screen_Add_All_Person; Business Account → Screen_Add_All_Business.
decisions.name: Decision_Account_Type_AddNew
decisions.label: Person or Business Account? (Add New)

decisions.description: Routes to the add-all screen (via Assign_Set_Context_Add) when the user chose "Add New", or to the type picker when they chose "Manage Existing".
decisions.name: Decision_Add_Or_Manage
decisions.label: Add New or Manage Existing?

decisions.description: Routes to the blank-state add-all screen when no contact info exists. Person Account with all blank -> Screen_Add_All_Person. Business Account with no addresses or phones -> Screen_Add_All_Business. All other accounts (including blank-state accounts that have already passed through the add-all screen) route to Decision_Account_Type for the normal type picker.
decisions.name: Decision_Blank_State
decisions.label: Any Existing Contact Info?

decisions.description: After Assign_Set_Add_Or_Manage captures the Person Account type picker, routes Business Accounts to Assign_Set_Type_Business_Picker to capture from the Business-only picker instead. Person Accounts skip directly to Decision_Add_Or_Manage.
decisions.name: Decision_Capture_Type_By_Account
decisions.label: Person or Business Account Type Capture?

decisions.description: After saving Do_Not_Mail__c, checks whether the account is a Person Account. Person Accounts proceed to Update_CommPrefs_Main_Person to save the two person-only comm pref fields. Business Accounts skip directly to Assign_Set_Add_Or_Manage.
decisions.name: Decision_CommPrefs_Person
decisions.label: Person Account? (Comm Prefs)

decisions.description: Guard: skip this address row if Street, City, PostalCode, and Country are all blank (user left the default empty row).
decisions.name: Decision_Guard_Address_AddAll
decisions.label: Address Row Has Data?

decisions.description: Guard: skip this address row if Street, City, PostalCode, and Country are all blank (business blank-state screen).
decisions.name: Decision_Guard_Address_AddAll_Bus
decisions.label: Address Row Has Data? (Business)

decisions.description: Guard: skip this email row if the value is blank or empty string (user left the default empty row).
decisions.name: Decision_Guard_Email_AddAll
decisions.label: Email Row Has Data?

decisions.description: Guard: skip this phone row if TelephoneNumber is blank or empty string — person blank-state screen.
decisions.name: Decision_Guard_Phone_AddAll
decisions.label: Phone Row Has Data?

decisions.description: Guard: skip this phone row if TelephoneNumber is blank or empty string — business blank-state screen.
decisions.name: Decision_Guard_Phone_AddAll_Bus
decisions.label: Phone Row Has Data? (Business)

decisions.description: Checks if any new addresses were added in the blank-state screen. Routes to create or skips.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_New_Addresses_AddAll
decisions.label: Any New Addresses (Add All)?

decisions.description: Checks if any new emails were added in the blank-state screen. Routes to create or skips.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_New_Emails_AddAll
decisions.label: Any New Emails (Add All)?

decisions.description: Checks if any new phones were added in the blank-state screen. Routes to create or success.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_New_Phones_AddAll
decisions.label: Any New Phones (Add All)?

decisions.description: Routes to the appropriate GET query based on var_SelectedType. Email routes to Get_Emails; Phone routes to Get_Phones; Address (default) routes to Get_Addresses.
decisions.name: Decision_Route_Type
decisions.label: Route by Contact Info Type

decisions.description: After primary screen: only update address primary if multiple addresses were entered.
decisions.name: Decision_Update_Primary_Address_AddAll
decisions.label: Multiple Addresses? (Update Primary)

decisions.description: Checks if any new addresses were added in the blank-state screen. Routes to create or skips.
decisions.name: Decision_Update_Primary_Email_AddAll
decisions.label: Multiple Emails? (Update Primary)

Flow.description: Screen flow launched from the Account record page to manage ContactPointAddress, ContactPointPhone, and ContactPointEmail records for Person and Business Accounts. Queries all contact point data upfront after Get_Account. Detects blank state (no contact info exists) and routes to a combined add-all screen. For existing records, first presents a choice to add new contact information or manage existing — Add New routes to the same add-all screen; Manage Existing shows the type picker. Person Accounts can manage Email, Phone, and Address; Business Accounts manage Phone and Address only. Each manage screen shows household sync status (address and phone ACRs), warns users before deletion, and routes removed rows through a confirmation screen before running delete DML. Supports add, edit, and delete with IsPrimary validation (max one primary per type). Communication preferences (Do Not Call, Do Not Mail, Email Opt Out) are editable on all entry screens. All DML and SOQL faults route to a shared Error_Screen. Sync flows handle downstream Account field updates.

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Populates the primary address radio buttons from var_NewAddressesForPrimary (re-queried after insert).
dynamicChoiceSets.name: ccs_PrimaryAddress

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Populates the primary email radio buttons from var_NewEmailsForPrimary (re-queried after insert). Display label is email address; value is the record Id.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: ccs_PrimaryEmail

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Populates the primary phone radio buttons from var_NewPhonesForPrimary (re-queried after insert).
dynamicChoiceSets.name: ccs_PrimaryPhone

formulas.description: Header text for Screen_Add_All_Business. Shows blank-state message when var_AddAllContext is "blank", otherwise shows the add-new message for existing accounts.
formulas.name: formula_AddAllHeaderBusiness
formulas.expression: IF({!var_AddAllContext} = "add", "Add new contact information for this account below.", "No contact information exists yet for this account.")

formulas.description: Header text for Screen_Add_All_Person. Shows blank-state message when var_AddAllContext is "blank", otherwise shows the add-new message for existing accounts.
formulas.name: formula_AddAllHeaderPerson
formulas.expression: IF({!var_AddAllContext} = "add", "Add new contact information for this person below.", "No contact information exists yet for this person.")

formulas.description: Abbreviated month name for the CPA name stamp.
formulas.name: formula_AddressMonthAbbrev

formulas.description: CPA Name convention: [Account Name] Mailing Address [Mon, YYYY]. Used when creating new ContactPointAddress records.
formulas.name: formula_AddressName

formulas.description: Success screen message after add-all save. Shows "has been added" when at least one record was created; shows "No contact information for NAME has been added" when all sections were left empty.
formulas.name: formula_SuccessAddAllMessage
formulas.expression: IF(({!var_CountNewAddresses} + {!var_CountNewEmails} + {!var_CountNewPhones}) > 0, "Contact information for " & {!var_Account.Name} & " has been added.", "No contact information for " & {!var_Account.Name} & " has been added.")

Flow.label: SMQS Screen Manage Contact Points

loops.description: Iterates AddressesList_New.AddedItems from person blank-state screen. Builds var_NewAddresses. When done routes to Loop_Split_Emails_AddAll_New.
loops.name: Loop_Split_Addresses_AddAll_New
loops.label: Build New Addresses from Add All Screen

loops.description: Iterates AddressesList_New_Bus.AddedItems from business blank-state screen. Builds var_NewAddresses. When done routes to Loop_Split_Phones_AddAll_New_Bus.
loops.name: Loop_Split_Addresses_AddAll_New_Bus
loops.label: Build New Addresses from Add All Screen (Business)

loops.description: Iterates EmailsList_New.AddedItems from person blank-state screen. Builds var_NewEmails. When done routes to Loop_Split_Phones_AddAll_New.
loops.name: Loop_Split_Emails_AddAll_New
loops.label: Build New Emails from Add All Screen

loops.description: Iterates PhonesList_New.AddedItems from person blank-state screen. Builds var_NewPhones. When done routes to Decision_Has_New_Addresses_AddAll.
loops.name: Loop_Split_Phones_AddAll_New
loops.label: Build New Phones from Add All Screen

loops.description: Iterates PhonesList_New_Bus.AddedItems from business blank-state screen. Builds var_NewPhones. When done routes to Decision_Has_New_Addresses_AddAll.
loops.name: Loop_Split_Phones_AddAll_New_Bus
loops.label: Build New Phones from Add All Screen (Business)

recordCreates.description: Creates new address records from blank-state add-all screen. Fault routes to Error_Screen.
recordCreates.name: Create_New_Addresses_AddAll
recordCreates.label: Create New Address Records (Add All)

recordCreates.description: Creates new email records from blank-state add-all screen. Fault routes to Error_Screen.
recordCreates.name: Create_New_Emails_AddAll
recordCreates.label: Create New Email Records (Add All)

recordCreates.description: Creates new phone records from blank-state add-all screen. Fault routes to Error_Screen.
recordCreates.name: Create_New_Phones_AddAll
recordCreates.label: Create New Phone Records (Add All)

recordLookups.description: Re-queries ContactPointAddress records just created for this account to get real IDs for the primary selection screen.
recordLookups.name: Get_New_Addresses_For_Primary
recordLookups.label: Get New Addresses for Primary Selection

recordLookups.description: Re-queries ContactPointEmail records just created for this account to get real IDs for the primary selection screen. Only reached when multiple emails were entered.
recordLookups.name: Get_New_Emails_For_Primary
recordLookups.label: Get New Emails for Primary Selection

recordLookups.description: Re-queries ContactPointPhone records just created for this account to get real IDs for the primary selection screen.
recordLookups.name: Get_New_Phones_For_Primary
recordLookups.label: Get New Phones for Primary Selection

recordUpdates.description: Clears IsPrimary on all new CPAs for this account before setting the user-chosen one as primary. Prevents multiple addresses ending up primary when count > 1.
recordUpdates.name: Clear_All_Address_Primaries_AddAll
recordUpdates.label: Clear All Address Primaries (Add All)

recordUpdates.description: Clears IsPrimary on all new CPEs for this account before setting the user-chosen one as primary.
recordUpdates.name: Clear_All_Email_Primaries_AddAll
recordUpdates.label: Clear All Email Primaries (Add All)

recordUpdates.description: Clears IsPrimary on all new CPPs for this account before setting the user-chosen one as primary.
recordUpdates.name: Clear_All_Phone_Primaries_AddAll
recordUpdates.label: Clear All Phone Primaries (Add All)

recordUpdates.description: Saves communication preference changes made on Screen_Add_All_Business (reached via the Add New path from an existing account). Runs before the add-all processing loops.
recordUpdates.name: Update_CommPrefs_AddAll_Business
recordUpdates.label: Save Communication Preferences (Add All Business)

recordUpdates.description: Saves communication preference changes made on Screen_Add_All_Person (reached via the Add New path from an existing account). Runs before the add-all processing loops.
recordUpdates.name: Update_CommPrefs_AddAll_Person
recordUpdates.label: Save Communication Preferences (Add All Person)

recordUpdates.description: Saves Do_Not_Mail__c from Screen_Select_And_Manage. Safe for all account types. Routes to Decision_CommPrefs_Person to conditionally write person-only fields next.
recordUpdates.name: Update_CommPrefs_Main
recordUpdates.label: Save Communication Preferences (All)

recordUpdates.description: Saves PersonDoNotCall and PersonHasOptedOutOfEmail from Screen_Select_And_Manage. Only reached for Person Accounts via Decision_CommPrefs_Person. Routes to Assign_Set_Add_Or_Manage.
recordUpdates.name: Update_CommPrefs_Main_Person
recordUpdates.label: Save Communication Preferences (Person Fields)

recordUpdates.description: Sets IsPrimary = true on the ContactPointAddress the user selected. Routes to Screen_Success_AddAll.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Primary_Address_AddAll
recordUpdates.label: Set Primary Address (Add All)

recordUpdates.description: Sets IsPrimary = true on the ContactPointEmail the user selected. Uses Id filter matching Screen_Primary_Selection_AddAll.field_Primary_Email selection. Routes to Decision_Update_Primary_Phone_AddAll.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Primary_Email_AddAll
recordUpdates.label: Set Primary Email (Add All)

recordUpdates.description: Sets IsPrimary = true on the ContactPointPhone the user selected. Routes to Decision_Update_Primary_Address_AddAll.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Primary_Phone_AddAll
recordUpdates.label: Set Primary Phone (Add All)

screens.description: Shared fault screen displayed when any DML or record lookup operation fails. Matches the Manage Household error screen pattern: surfaces the triggering record Id and name, the full fault message, and the current flow stage so an administrator can diagnose the failure. allowBack and allowFinish are both true so the user can retry or dismiss.
screens.name: Error_Screen
screens.label: Error Screen

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText:
The screen flow "Manage Contact Points" has failed. Please send this message to your administrator.


Triggering record: {!recordId} - {!var_Account.Name}


Fault Message: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}


Current Stage: {!$Flow.CurrentStage}

screens.description: Entry screen for Business Accounts to add addresses and phones. Reached from the blank-state path (no existing contact info) or from the Add New path (existing account). Header copy adjusts based on var_AddAllContext. On Save, comm prefs are saved and added rows are created.
screens.name: Screen_Add_All_Business
screens.label: Add Contact Information

fields.name: txt_AddAll_Header_Business
fields.fieldText:
{!formula_AddAllHeaderBusiness}


Add addresses and phone numbers below. All sections are optional — leave any section empty to skip it.

fields.name: txt_CommPrefs_Disclaimer_AddAll_Bus
fields.fieldText: These communication preferences provide a visual indicator on the account page. Talk with your system administrator to clarify how they may affect automated processes or data sharing.

screens.description: Entry screen for Person Accounts to add addresses, emails, and phones. Reached from the blank-state path (no existing contact info) or from the Add New path (existing account). Header copy adjusts based on var_AddAllContext. On Save, comm prefs are saved and added rows are created.
screens.name: Screen_Add_All_Person
screens.label: Add Contact Information

fields.name: txt_AddAll_Header_Person
fields.fieldText:
{!formula_AddAllHeaderPerson}


Add addresses, emails, and phone numbers below. All sections are optional — leave any section empty to skip it.

fields.name: txt_CommPrefs_Disclaimer_AddAll_Person
fields.fieldText: These communication preferences provide a visual indicator on the account page. Talk with your system administrator to clarify how they may affect automated processes or data sharing.

screens.description: Shown after data entry when the user added more than one of any contact type. Presents a radio button per type (each section only visible when multiple records were entered) to designate the primary. All three sections appear on one screen.
screens.name: Screen_Primary_Selection_AddAll
screens.label: Select Primary Contact Info

fields.name: txt_Primary_Intro
fields.fieldText:
You entered more than one of a contact type. Select which record should be marked as primary for each type below.


﻿The primary record is stored on the account record and appears most prominently in reports.

fields.name: field_Primary_Email
fields.fieldText: Which email would you like to mark as primary?

fields.name: field_Primary_Phone
fields.fieldText: Which phone number would you like to mark as primary?

fields.name: field_Primary_Address
fields.fieldText: Which mailing address would you like to mark as primary?

screens.description: Merged entry screen for all existing-account flows. Shown when the account has existing contact info. Combines the Add-or-Manage choice, the contact type picker (with person/business visibility rules), and communication preferences into one screen. Default selection is "Manage" so existing-account users see the type picker immediately. The Add New / Manage Existing picker, type picker (Email only visible for Person Accounts), and Do Not Call / Email Opt Out (only visible for Person Accounts) use conditional visibility rules.
screens.name: Screen_Select_And_Manage
screens.label: Manage Contact Info

fields.name: field_AddOrManage
fields.fieldText: What would you like to do?

fields.name: field_ContactType_Main
fields.fieldText: What type of contact info would you like to manage?

fields.name: field_ContactType_Business
fields.fieldText: What type of contact info would you like to manage?

fields.name: txt_CommPrefs_Disclaimer_Main
fields.fieldText: These communication preferences provide a visual indicator on the account page. Talk with your system administrator to clarify how they may affect automated processes or data sharing.

screens.description: Success screen after blank-state add-all save. Shows Account name.
screens.name: Screen_Success_AddAll
screens.label: Contact Information Added

subflows.description: Calls SMQS_Screen_Manage_ContactPoints_Address_Subflow with pre-queried data. No connector — subflow handles its own success/error screens and ends the interview.
subflows.name: Call_Manage_Address
subflows.label: Manage Addresses

subflows.description: Calls SMQS_Screen_Manage_ContactPoints_Email_Subflow with pre-queried data. No connector — subflow handles its own success/error screens and ends the interview.
subflows.name: Call_Manage_Email
subflows.label: Manage Emails

subflows.description: Calls SMQS_Screen_Manage_ContactPoints_Phone_Subflow with pre-queried data. No connector — subflow handles its own success/error screens and ends the interview.
subflows.name: Call_Manage_Phone
subflows.label: Manage Phones

subflows.description: Calls SMQS_Screen_Manage_ContactPoints_Subflow to run all 8 startup queries. Outputs wire to parent variables. Query faults propagate through the subflow and surface as a fault on this element — caught by Salesforce and shown to the user as an unhandled error.
subflows.name: Subflow_Get_ContactInfo
subflows.label: Get Contact Info

variables.description: The Id of the Account record page the flow is embedded on. Passed in automatically by the Lightning page. Used as the ParentId filter on all GET queries and stamped onto new records created via the repeaters.
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: The Account record retrieved by Get_Account. Stores Id, Name, IsPersonAccount, PersonDoNotCall, Do_Not_Mail__c, and PersonHasOptedOutOfEmail. Name is referenced in Screen_Success and Error_Screen. IsPersonAccount drives Decision_Account_Type. Comm pref fields pre-populate the checkboxes on Screen_Select_Type_Person and Screen_Select_Type_Business.
variables.name: var_Account

variables.description: Controls header copy on Screen_Add_All_Person and Screen_Add_All_Business. Default is blank (blank-state path shows "No contact information exists yet"). Set to "add" by Assign_Set_Context_Add when the user arrives via the Add New path from an existing account.
variables.name: var_AddAllContext

variables.description: Captures the choice from Screen_Add_Or_Manage: "Add" routes to the add-all screen; "Manage" routes to the type picker. Evaluated by Decision_Add_Or_Manage.
variables.name: var_AddOrManage

variables.description: All ContactPointAddress records for this Account. Pre-populated by Get_Addresses and bound to the AddressesList repeater. allItems output writes back after the screen.
variables.name: var_AllAddresses

variables.description: All ContactPointEmail records for this Account. Pre-populated by Get_Emails (IsPrimary DESC) and bound as the collection input to the EmailsList repeater. After the user interacts with the repeater, the allItems output writes back to this variable — containing both edited existing records (with Id) and any newly added records (no Id).
variables.name: var_AllEmails

variables.description: All ContactPointPhone records for this Account. Pre-populated by Get_Phones and bound to the PhonesList repeater. allItems output writes back after the screen.
variables.name: var_AllPhones

variables.description: Count of new address records built during the blank-state AddAll session.
variables.name: var_CountNewAddresses

variables.description: Count of new email records built during the blank-state AddAll session. Incremented by Assign_Build_New_Email_AddAll. Used to gate primary selection screen visibility.
variables.name: var_CountNewEmails

variables.description: Count of new phone records built during the blank-state AddAll session.
variables.name: var_CountNewPhones

variables.description: The name of the household account. Set from out_HouseholdName after Subflow_Get_ContactInfo. Passed to Address and Phone subflows for display in sync table section headers.
variables.name: var_HouseholdName

variables.description: New ContactPointAddress records (Id is null) built by Loop_Split_Addresses. ParentId stamped. Passed to Create_New_Addresses.
variables.name: var_NewAddresses

variables.description: Re-queried ContactPointAddress records after blank-state insert. Used to back ccs_PrimaryAddress.
variables.name: var_NewAddressesForPrimary

variables.description: New ContactPointEmail records (Id is null) built by Loop_Split_Emails. Each record has ParentId stamped before being added here. Passed to Create_New_Emails for the insert DML.
variables.name: var_NewEmails

variables.description: Re-queried ContactPointEmail records after blank-state insert. Used to back ccs_PrimaryEmail on Screen_Primary_Selection_AddAll.
variables.name: var_NewEmailsForPrimary

variables.description: New ContactPointPhone records (Id is null) built by Loop_Split_Phones. ParentId stamped. Passed to Create_New_Phones.
variables.name: var_NewPhones

variables.description: Re-queried ContactPointPhone records after blank-state insert. Used to back ccs_PrimaryPhone.
variables.name: var_NewPhonesForPrimary

variables.description: Active ACR records where Sync_Household_Address__c = false. Populated by Get_ACRs_Sync_No. Displayed in the "Address will not sync to these people" read-only table on Screen_Manage_Addresses.
variables.name: var_NoSyncACRs

variables.description: Count of active ACRs where Sync_Household_Address__c = false. Set from out_NoSyncACRs_Count after Subflow_Get_ContactInfo. Passed to Address subflow to control sync table visibility.
variables.name: var_NoSyncACRs_Count

variables.description: Active ACR records where Sync_Household_Phone__c = false. Populated by Get_ACRs_Sync_Phone_No. Displayed in dt_SyncPhoneNo on Screen_Manage_Phones.
variables.name: var_NoSyncPhoneACRs

variables.description: Count of active ACRs where Sync_Household_Phone__c = false. Set from out_NoSyncPhoneACRs_Count after Subflow_Get_ContactInfo. Passed to Phone subflow to control sync table visibility.
variables.name: var_NoSyncPhoneACRs_Count

variables.description: The Person Account's own ACR connecting them to their household. Null for Household/Business accounts. Set from out_PersonACR after Subflow_Get_ContactInfo. Passed to Address and Phone subflows to drive per-person sync visibility.
variables.name: var_PersonACR

variables.description: The Id of the ContactPointAddress the user selected as primary on Screen_Primary_Selection_AddAll.
variables.name: var_PrimaryAddressId

variables.description: The Id of the ContactPointEmail the user selected as primary on Screen_Primary_Selection_AddAll.
variables.name: var_PrimaryEmailId

variables.description: The Id of the ContactPointPhone the user selected as primary on Screen_Primary_Selection_AddAll.
variables.name: var_PrimaryPhoneId

variables.description: Stores the contact info type selected by the user on the type picker screen ("Email", "Phone", or "Address"). Set by Assign_Set_Type_Person or Assign_Set_Type_Business. Evaluated by Decision_Route_Type.
variables.name: var_SelectedType

variables.description: Intermediate single-record variable used by Loop_Split_Addresses (update path) and Loop_Split_Addresses_New (new path) to stage field values before adding to var_UpdateAddresses or var_NewAddresses.
variables.name: var_SingleAddress

variables.description: Intermediate single-record variable used by Loop_Split_Emails (update path) and Loop_Split_Emails_New (new path) to stage field values before adding to var_UpdateEmails or var_NewEmails.
variables.name: var_SingleEmail

variables.description: Intermediate single-record variable used by Loop_Split_Phones (update path) and Loop_Split_Phones_New (new path) to stage field values before adding to var_UpdatePhones or var_NewPhones.
variables.name: var_SinglePhone

variables.description: Active ACR records where Sync_Household_Address__c = true. Populated by Get_ACRs_Sync_Yes. Displayed in the "Address will sync to these people" read-only table on Screen_Manage_Addresses.
variables.name: var_SyncACRs

variables.description: Count of active ACRs where Sync_Household_Address__c = true. Set from out_SyncACRs_Count after Subflow_Get_ContactInfo. Passed to Address subflow to control sync table visibility.
variables.name: var_SyncACRs_Count

variables.description: Active ACR records where Sync_Household_Phone__c = true. Populated by Get_ACRs_Sync_Phone_Yes. Displayed in dt_SyncPhoneYes on Screen_Manage_Phones.
variables.name: var_SyncPhoneACRs

variables.description: Count of active ACRs where Sync_Household_Phone__c = true. Set from out_SyncPhoneACRs_Count after Subflow_Get_ContactInfo. Passed to Phone subflow to control sync table visibility.
variables.name: var_SyncPhoneACRs_Count
